mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in retail sales signals stronger near-term household demand and revenue growth for listed firms, producing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS snapshot before decision point was 456321.0
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward 20-day Rank IC of RSAFS 3-month momentum is below 0.03 for two consecutive 3-year rolling windows or positive-momentum months do not outperform negative-momentum months.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing into a rising federal funds trend raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, lowering equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month moving average after being at or below it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS snapshot before decision point was 0.4
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation with a still-low policy rate signals that monetary policy is behind the inflation curve, increasing expected future tightening and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized change exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS is below 1%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available CPIAUCSL snapshot before decision point was 239.828
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction has a nonnegative 60-day return coefficient in walk-forward regressions or triggered returns exceed baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains accompanied by a falling unemployment rate indicate broad income growth and lower recession risk, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest available PAYEMS snapshot before decision point was 144598.0
fact:latest available UNRATE snapshot before decision point was 4.9
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations fail to deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of out-of-sample cases or if the interaction coefficient is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals rising real output and improved operating leverage, causing higher expected corporate profits and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO snapshot before decision point was 104.4016
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month momentum has a negative 60-day Rank IC in two consecutive 3-year rolling windows or positive INDPRO momentum underperforms negative momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A material downturn in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future pressure on construction-related earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average and is more than 10% below its level 6 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST snapshot before decision point was 1211.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-crossing signals are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if average triggered returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When real activity rises while consumer inflation accelerates, markets price margin pressure and faster tightening, so the joint signal from output, sales, and prices produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds 3% while INDPRO and RSAFS both rise over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the three-series interaction has a positive 5-day return coefficient out of sample or if triggered 5-day returns are not below unconditional 5-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment from its recent low signals deterioration in labor demand and recession risk, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 6-month low
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE snapshot before decision point was 4.9
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE rollover observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if downside hit rate is below 50%.
